name: Healthy Chili in Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beef of all visible fat.
2. Cut the beef into 1/2 inch cubes.
3. Place the meat in the crockpot and stir in tomato paste to completely coat the meat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and stir well to blend.
5. Do not add any additional liquid.
6. Cover and cook for 12 hours on LOW heat.
7. When done, you can skin any remaining fat from the surface.
8. Yield: 4 servings.
